name: 16p13_2_RBFOX1_A2BP1_SD
description: 16p13.2 SD blocks within and flanking RBFOX1 (A2BP1). Large intronic SDs at ~95% identity mediate rare ~1-2 Mb deletions affecting RBFOX1 in neurodevelopmental disorders.

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple intragenic SD blocks within the >1.7 Mb RBFOX1 gene; mosaic LCR16a-derived duplicons; some recurrent breakpoints in intron 4 and intron 7 of RBFOX1.
